title: Nutrient Value of Some Common Foods - Open Government Portal
content:
## Nutrient Value of Some Common Foods
Published by Health Canada, the Nutrient Value of Some Common Foods (NVSCF) booklet provides Canadians with a resource that lists 19 nutrients for 1000 of the most commonly consumed foods in Canada.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Health Canada
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
- Nutrient Value of Some Common Foods HTML English publication HTML Explore More information Go to resource
- Nutrient Value of Some Common Foods HTML French publication HTML Explore More information Go to resource
